% Review / Survey Paper Template
% Generated by Researcher plugin
% Compile with: scripts/latex-compile.py (uses tectonic, latexmk, or pdflatex, whichever is installed)

\documentclass[12pt,a4paper]{article}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\doublespacing

\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{longtable}

\usepackage[round,authoryear]{natbib}

\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    citecolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% --- TikZ for taxonomy diagrams ---
% \usepackage{tikz}
% \usetikzlibrary{trees,arrows.meta,positioning}

\title{TITLE: A Survey}
\author{
    First Author\textsuperscript{1,*} \and
    Second Author\textsuperscript{2}
    \\[1em]
    \small\textsuperscript{1}Department, University, City, Country \\
    \small\textsuperscript{2}Department, Institution, City, Country \\
    \small\textsuperscript{*}Corresponding author: \href{mailto:email@example.com}{email@example.com}
}
\date{}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\begin{abstract}
% Background, Scope, Method, Key findings, Conclusions
\end{abstract}

\tableofcontents
\newpage

\section{Introduction}
% Context, motivation, scope of review, research questions, paper structure

\section{Background}
% Key concepts and definitions needed to understand the survey

\section{Methodology}
% Search strategy, inclusion/exclusion criteria, databases searched
% PRISMA flow diagram if systematic review

\section{Taxonomy / Classification}
% Organize reviewed works into categories
% Include taxonomy diagram (TikZ)

\section{Detailed Review}
% Subsections per category from taxonomy
% For each: approach description, strengths, limitations, key results

\section{Comparative Analysis}
% Summary comparison table of all reviewed approaches
% Dimensions: method type, dataset, metrics, performance, limitations

\section{Open Challenges and Future Directions}
% Gaps identified in the literature
% Promising research directions

\section{Conclusion}
% Summary of findings, key takeaways, recommendations

\section*{Acknowledgments}

\bibliographystyle{plainnat}
\bibliography{references/library}

\end{document}
